description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and a necktie. The suit is tailored and fitted, with a jacket and matching trousers, and the shirt is buttoned up to the neck. The figure's arms are slightly extended outward, and the hands are relaxed with fingers naturally spread. The facial features are defined, and the hairstyle is short and neatly styled. The shoes are formal and complement the business attire, while the overall build is proportionate and realistic. The figure stands upright, exuding a professional and composed demeanor suitable for urban or office environments.
description: A professionally dressed adult male in a tailored business suit, collared shirt, and tie, standing upright with arms slightly extended.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, tie, shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the relaxed hand posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and the back of the head and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and the side seam of the suit.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
